backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of all loading spinners, overlays, and isLoading state from TabBar.tsx, TabContent.tsx, and useTabs.ts with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Cheetah 1.0 app, loading Puter.js, CodeMirror (with multiple language modes and Dracula theme), and Google CSE before mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page navigation, tab state, and a panic mode overlay (60-second white screen triggered by button or Cmd/Ctrl+P/B shortcuts).
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor tab using CodeMirror with HTML/CSS/JS/Python language support, localStorage persistence, and a live iframe preview for runnable languages.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Slide presentation builder with a slide list, per-slide title/body/color editor, keyboard-navigable fullscreen presentation mode, and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with style controls, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label displayed below.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (e.g., CORS proxy routes) in collapsible sections, rendered as an overlay below the header.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, app name, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component with links to the five main pages (Home, Games, AI, Code, Quick Open) and keyboard shortcut hints at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting tab switching and creation.
Renders the content area for a single browser tab, showing a welcome screen, an error state with retry/open-external options, or a proxied iframe for loaded URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that syncs state with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Hook managing browser-like tab state (open, close, navigate, proxy rotation) with persistence via localStorage, including URL normalization and multi-proxy fallback logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/purple theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base layers, glassmorphism utilities, custom scrollbar styles, and animated gradient backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to the Puter.js AI API, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists Q&A history in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) rendered via a styled tab bar that switches between the corresponding child components.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Renders a grid of educational/unblocked game site cards (Math Playground, Scratch, Khan Academy, etc.) with icons and colors, each opening the site URL via the proxy when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Implements the main browser page with an address bar, back/forward/refresh controls, proxy info panel, and an iframe that loads URLs through a CORS proxy.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Displays a grid of popular site shortcuts (TikTok, YouTube, Wikipedia, Disney+, ChatGPT, Google Gemini) with styled cards that open each site in the proxy on click.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom amethyst/violet/magenta color palettes, JetBrains Mono and Rajdhani fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state at version 9, documenting Cheetah 1.0's architecture (single index.html, allorigins proxy, Puter.js AI, localStorage), existing features, and known issues.
